config.description: Name of the dummy config fixture to use as the run target

setup.description: Infrastructure and resource setup for this test

loki.description: Whether this test requires the Loki service

opensearch.description: Whether this test requires the OpenSearch service

smtp.description: Whether this test requires the SMTP backend

facet.description: Whether this test requires the facet container

connections.description: Connections to persist before the test runs

oneOf.description: $ref path to a YAML file relative to the fixture

permissions.description: Permissions to persist before the test runs

oneOf.description: $ref path to a YAML file relative to the fixture

params.description: Parameters passed to the playbook run. Use {{varName}} for template variables resolved at runtime (e.g. {{viewRef}}, {{smtpURL}}, {{facetURL}})

playbook.description: Inline PlaybookSpec — the spec portion of a Playbook CRD

output.description: Expected output for structural deep-equal comparison

assertions.description: Optional CEL expressions evaluated after the run completes. Available variables: emails (list of {body: string})

name.description: Action name — must match the playbook action name

result.description: Expected key-value pairs in the action result map

artifacts.description: Expected artifacts produced by this action

artifact_logs.description: Expected log output from the artifact content (newline-separated log messages)

content_type.description: Expected MIME content type of the artifact
